exec: pm.test('GoRest API is reachable but access is restricted by Cloudflare', () => {

description.content: While running the other test collections in CI, I noticed they were all failing with a 403 error. After some investigation I found that GoRest blocks automated requests coming from cloud servers like GitHub Actions — this is a security layer called Cloudflare. As a workaround, I created this collection to intentionally validate that block, so the pipeline has at least one job that passes and documents the known limitation.
